movies.title: Inception
movies.description: A skilled thief enters people's dreams to steal secrets but is given the impossible task of planting an idea into someone's mind.

movies.title: The Shawshank Redemption
movies.description: A banker sentenced to life in prison forms an unlikely friendship and never loses hope of freedom.

movies.title: The Dark Knight
movies.description: Batman faces his greatest challenge as the Joker unleashes chaos across Gotham City.

movies.title: Interstellar
movies.description: A group of astronauts travel through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity.

movies.title: Parasite
movies.description: A poor family cleverly infiltrates the lives of a wealthy household, leading to unexpected consequences.

movies.title: The Matrix
movies.description: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against intelligent machines.

movies.title: Gladiator
movies.description: A betrayed Roman general fights his way through the gladiator arena to seek justice.

movies.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
movies.description: A young hobbit begins an epic journey to destroy a powerful ring before evil can claim it.

movies.title: Whiplash
movies.description: A talented drummer pushes himself to the limit under the guidance of a ruthless music instructor.

movies.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
movies.director: Bob Persichetti, Peter Ramsey, Rodney Rothman
movies.description: Teenager Miles Morales becomes Spider-Man and joins heroes from other dimensions to save the multiverse.

movies.title: Home Alone
movies.description: An eight-year-old boy is accidentally left behind when his family leaves for Christmas vacation and must defend his home from two burglars.

movies.title: Jungle Cruise
movies.description: A riverboat captain and a determined scientist embark on a dangerous expedition through the Amazon in search of a legendary healing tree.

movies.title: The Little Mermaid
movies.description: A young mermaid dreams of living in the human world and makes a life-changing deal with a sea witch to pursue her destiny.
